task: I’m trying to put together a quick accessory shortlist for the different cars in our household, and I want to see real product pages rather than just a text summary. Please start on WeatherTech and use the vehicle selector for a 2020 Toyota Highlander to confirm which floor mat option and which cargo liner or cargo mat option actually fit, because the Highlander is the one I’m most likely to buy for first. When you find the cargo liner page, open the actual product listing and leave that tab open so I can look at the photos and fitment details later. After you’ve confirmed the Highlander cargo setup, go to Temu and find a set of car headrest hooks that would work for a Fiat 500, mainly so I can compare whether a cheap organizer add-on is enough for our smaller car instead of doing a full cargo solution. Open the actual Temu listing and note the product name plus whatever compatibility details on the page make it seem usable with a Fiat 500. Then use Google to find one suitable LED emblem option for a 2023 Honda Civic, open the actual product result in its own tab, and grab the product name and current price so I have one exterior accessory idea to round out the shortlist. In the end, give me a concise comparison covering the Highlander fitment details, the direct WeatherTech cargo liner link, the Fiat 500 hook listing with compatibility notes, and the Civic LED emblem option with price.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully navigated to the WeatherTech site, selected the 2020 Toyota Highlander, and identified the FloorLiner HP complete set as a guaranteed fit.

R2: success - The agent navigated to the WeatherTech cargo liner page for the 2020 Toyota Highlander, confirmed fitment options (e.g., Behind 2nd Row), and provided the direct link in the final summary.

R3: success - The agent found a 4-piece car headrest hook set on Temu and identified the product name as "4pcs hidden hooks for car headrest seat back multi functional car seat back hooks for hanging items".

R4: success - The agent reported the compatibility details from the Temu listing, specifically noting "Applicable Models: Universally Applicable" and that it is designed for car headrest seat backs.

R5: success - The agent found an LED emblem for the 2023 Honda Civic on RedLineMods, identified as the "2022-2026 Xgen Civic Led Emblem".

R6: success - The agent reported the price for the Civic LED emblem as "Sale $189.99, regular $229.99".

R7: success - The agent provided a concise comparison table covering all three vehicles, the requested accessory categories, fitment details, the cargo liner link, and the Civic emblem price.

rubric_results.requirement: Identify the WeatherTech floor mat product that fits a 2020 Toyota Highlander and report the fitment details.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm the WeatherTech vehicle-selected results or product page shows 2020 Toyota Highlander fitment for the floor mat option.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the WeatherTech site, selected the 2020 Toyota Highlander, and identified the FloorLiner HP complete set as a guaranteed fit.

rubric_results.requirement: Identify the WeatherTech cargo liner or cargo mat product that fits a 2020 Toyota Highlander and include the direct product page link.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm the open WeatherTech cargo liner tab shows the fitting Highlander cargo product and that a direct link is provided.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent navigated to the WeatherTech cargo liner page for the 2020 Toyota Highlander, confirmed fitment options (e.g., Behind 2nd Row), and provided the direct link in the final summary.

rubric_results.requirement: Find one Temu car headrest hook set that would work with a Fiat 500 and report the product name.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm the Temu listing page is open and the reported product name matches the visible listing title.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent found a 4-piece car headrest hook set on Temu and identified the product name as "4pcs hidden hooks for car headrest seat back multi functional car seat back hooks for hanging items".

rubric_results.requirement: Report compatibility details from the Temu listing that support why the hook set would work with a Fiat 500.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can verify the cited listing text or specs mention universal fit, seat headrest mounting, dimensions, or other compatibility cues visible on the Temu page.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent reported the compatibility details from the Temu listing, specifically noting "Applicable Models: Universally Applicable" and that it is designed for car headrest seat backs.

rubric_results.requirement: Find one suitable LED emblem option for a 2023 Honda Civic and report its product name.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm the selected Google result or opened product page shows an LED emblem option associated with a 2023 Honda Civic.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent found an LED emblem for the 2023 Honda Civic on RedLineMods, identified as the "2022-2026 Xgen Civic Led Emblem".

rubric_results.requirement: Include the displayed price for the selected 2023 Honda Civic LED emblem option.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can verify the reported price matches the visible price on the Google result or opened product page.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent reported the price for the Civic LED emblem as "Sale $189.99, regular $229.99".

rubric_results.requirement: Return a concise comparison covering all three vehicles and the requested accessory categories.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm the final response includes Highlander floor and cargo fitment details with cargo link, Fiat 500 hook name with compatibility notes, and Civic LED emblem name with price in a compact comparison format.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent provided a concise comparison table covering all three vehicles, the requested accessory categories, fitment details, the cargo liner link, and the Civic emblem price.
